timeWarp.comment: Top-bar fast-forward (user mandate 2026-06-12). 1x is always available; 5x unlocks with the Battle Tempo major; 10x/50x/100x unlock with Tempo Mastery connector ranks 1/2/3. unlockRank null means node ownership alone unlocks the tier; a number means that node must have at least that rank. Tests force any tier. maxStepsPerFrame caps the burst so a 100x frame can never lock the loop — at 50fps render and SIM_DT=1/60, 100x wants ~120 steps/frame, well under the cap.
